definition: A designer- or product-owned behavioral preference (focus strategy, collision handling, truncation) propagated down a DOM subtree via DI. Partial, overridable, and never structural — Ambient Intent cannot set model or editable; those are Trait Selection.
usage: The behavioral-preference channel in the Droplist family and other composable systems. Set via injector.set('customContexts:droplistIntent', { focusStrategy: 'virtual', … }); resolved per-dimension as explicit ⊕ ambient ⊕ default. The Loader Intent's loaderIntent provider is the original precedent.
